hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '(^tests/.*\.spec\.ts$|\.spec\.ts$)' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Playwright test file detected. Invoke the playwright-expert skill (Skill tool, skill=\"playwright-expert\") before writing or editing this file if not already done this task."}}' || true
